title: Next Mac Mini Will Reportedly Have Mismatched M6 and M5 Pro Chips
excerpt: Apple is testing new Mac mini configurations with generationally mismatched M6 and M5 Pro chips, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, but he did...
content_html:
Wednesday July 22, 2026 10:04 am PDT by Joe Rossignol

Popular Stories

'Apple Upgrade' Program Reportedly Launching Next Week

Apple and Klarna are partnering on a new "Apple Upgrade" leasing program set to launch in the U.S. on Tuesday, July 28, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The program will allow you to finance most iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch models, with a 24-month term for iPhones and Apple Watches and a 36-month term for iPads and Macs. Customers will be able to pay off the device early during...

iPhone 18 Pro Launching in Two Months With These 12 New Features

It is now mid-July, and that means the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are now just two months away. The devices are expected to look similar to the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone 17 Pro Max, but there will still be many year-over-year changes, with rumored features including a smaller Dynamic Island, 5G via satellite, and more. Apple is expected to unveil the iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max, ...

Apple to Overhaul Mac Lineup With 11 New Models

Apple is preparing to refresh every Mac it sells over the next two years, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The plans come amid a Mac resurgence, with sales projected to climb for a third consecutive year, partly thanks to a growing following among users who lean on the machines for demanding, agent-based AI workloads. The wave of new Macs will begin this fall with a refreshed...

content_html_zh:
太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 22 日星期三上午 10:04 作者：Joe Rossignol

热门故事

据报道“苹果升级”计划下周启动

据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 报道，Apple 和 Klarna 正在合作开展一项新的“Apple Upgrade”租赁计划，该计划将于 7 月 28 日星期二在美国推出。 该计划将允许您为大多数 iPhone、iPad、Mac 和 Apple Watch 型号提供融资，iPhone 和 Apple Watch 的期限为 24 个月，iPad 和 Mac 的期限为 36 个月。 客户将能够在...期间提前还清设备费用。

iPhone 18 Pro 两个月后发布 12 项新功能

现在已经是 7 月中旬了，这意味着距离 iPhone 18 Pro 和 iPhone 18 Pro Max 上市只有两个月了。 预计这些设备看起来与 iPhone 17 Pro 和 iPhone 17 Pro Max 类似，但仍将有许多同比变化，传闻中的功能包括更小的动态岛、通过卫星的 5G 等等。 苹果预计将推出 iPhone 18 Pro、iPhone 18 Pro Max...

Apple 将以 11 款新机型彻底改变 Mac 产品阵容

据彭博社的马克·古尔曼称，苹果准备在未来两年内更新其销售的每台 Mac。 这些计划是在 Mac 复苏之际推出的，预计销量将连续第三年攀升，部分原因是越来越多的用户依赖这些机器来处理要求较高的、基于代理的人工智能工作负载。 新 Mac 的浪潮将于今年秋季开始，并配备更新的...
